Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER is performed after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total time from Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that include a prior Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER compared to the elapsed time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in successful variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time it takes Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER to be followed by Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that eventually lead to re-submission versus variants that terminate without re-submission
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER measured from the immediately preceding approval activity (Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER or Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Total waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER after Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Minimum time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that contain Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER earlier in the trace
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'

Name: Average time between Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER and the next occurrence of Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE, compared to the average time between Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER and the next Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Time from Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER to Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER in cases where the same budget owner both approves and later rejects similar declarations
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by BUDGET OWNER'
